item.title: CVE-2026-31431 - CVE-2026-31431 - 未命名漏洞
item.description:
严重程度: Unknown
发布日期: Unknown
来源: Unknown
描述: 暂无详细描述
相关PoC:
copyfail: Defense-in-depth primitives for CVE-2026-31431 (Copy Fail) — kernel detection probe and LD_PRELOAD AF_ALG block
copy-fail-blocker: BPF-LSM mitigation for CVE-2026-31431 (Copy Fail) — denies AF_ALG socket creation cluster-wide
cve-2026-31431: None
Paranoid-Copy-Fail-CVE-2026-31431: Paranoid disable whole AF_ALG + algif_* modules - Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431)
copyfail-rs: CVE-2026-31431
alg_check: CVE-2026-31431
PATCH-CVE-2026-31431-Ubuntu_Debian: Permanent Mitigation Script for CVE-2026-31431
wg.copyfail.patch: CVE-2026-31431 eBPF fix
copy-fail-tiny-elf-CVE-2026-31431: Minimal no-libc Linux x86_64 ELF PoC build for Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431)
CVE-2026-31431: CVE-2026-31431 is a bug in the handling of scatter-gather I/O operations and page cache references in the Linux kernel cryptographic subsystem — specifically in the AF_ALG socket implementation for AEAD algorithms (crypto/af_alg.c, crypto/aead.c).
